inputs.label: Solar Zenith Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the sun and the vertical. 0° means sun directly overhead.

inputs.label: Ozone Column Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Total ozone column in Dobson Units. Typical range 200–500 DU.

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level in meters.

inputs.label: Surface Albedo
inputs.businessContext: Reflectivity of the ground surface, between 0 and 1. Typical grass: 0.03, snow: 0.8.

inputs.label: Aerosol Optical Depth
inputs.businessContext: Aerosol optical depth at 550 nm. Clear atmosphere: 0.05–0.1, polluted: >0.5.

inputs.label: Cloud Cover Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of sky covered by clouds, 0 (clear) to 1 (overcast).

formulas.clearSkyUvIndex: 12 * Math.pow(Math.cos(sza * Math.PI / 180), 1.2) * Math.exp(-0.003 * (ozone - 250)) * (1 + 0.04 * altitude / 1000) * (1 + albedo) * Math.exp(-aod)
